str_properties.name: Sunset Beach Bungalow
str_properties.description: Charming 3-bedroom beach bungalow just 200 steps from the Gulf. Renovated kitchen, private pool and hot tub, covered patio with gulf breeze. Perfect for families and small groups looking for a quintessential beach vacation.
str_properties.neighborhood_guide: Walk to Flora-Bama Lounge (5 min), The Hangout (10 min). Grocery: Publix 2 miles north. Dining: Fisherman's Corner for fresh catch, LuLu's for family-friendly. Parasailing and dolphin cruises at the public beach pier (0.5 miles). Rent bikes at Island Cycles.

str_properties.name: The Loft on 5th — Downtown Luxury
str_properties.description: Stylish 1-bedroom loft in the heart of downtown Nashville. Floor-to-ceiling windows, exposed brick, designer furnishings. Walk to Broadway honky-tonks, the Ryman, and 100+ restaurants. In-building gym and EV charging. Keypad entry for self check-in.
str_properties.neighborhood_guide: Broadway honky-tonks (3 min walk). The Ryman Auditorium (5 min). Best coffee: Barista Parlor (2 blocks). Fine dining: The Catbird Seat (reservations essential). Late night: Robert's Western World. Grocery: Turnip Truck (4 blocks). Uber/Lyft everywhere, or rent a scooter.

str_properties.name: Misty Ridge Mountain Cabin
str_properties.description: Stunning 4-bedroom luxury cabin on Timber Ridge with panoramic Smoky Mountain views. Stone fireplace, game room with pool table, wraparound deck with hot tub overlooking the valley. 15 minutes to downtown Gatlinburg, 10 minutes to national park entrance.
str_properties.neighborhood_guide: Great Smoky Mountains National Park entrance at Sugarlands (10 min drive). Downtown Gatlinburg strip (15 min). Ober Gatlinburg ski resort (20 min). Best pancakes: Pancake Pantry. Moonshine tastings: Ole Smoky Distillery. Hiking: Laurel Falls (easy), Chimney Tops (moderate), Mt. LeConte (strenuous). Bear sightings are common — use bear-proof bins.

str_bookings.special_requests: Arriving late around 9pm — please leave porch light on. Bringing two small dogs.
In town for a concert at the Ryman — any restaurant recommendations nearby?
Spring break family trip with grandparents. Need pack-n-play for toddler if available.
Repeat guest — same crew as last September!
Valentine's weekend getaway. Any champagne add-on available?
Is the pool heated? Traveling with an elderly parent.

str_guests.name: Sarah Mitchell
str_guests.notes: Repeat guest across two properties. Always leaves detailed positive reviews. Brings well-behaved dogs. Consider offering returning guest discount.

str_guests.name: James Rodriguez
str_guests.notes: First-time guest via VRBO. Asked lots of questions pre-arrival but was a great guest. Has an inquiry pending for beach house.

str_guests.name: Wei Chen
str_guests.notes: Spring break booking for extended family (8 guests including grandparents and toddler). First stay — needs pack-n-play.

str_guests.name: Emily Watson
str_guests.notes: Direct booking repeat guest. Met at the property last September, rebooked directly for March. Always travels with same friend group of 4. Perfect guest — spotless on checkout.

str_guests.name: Marcus Johnson
str_guests.notes: Business traveler. Quick 2-night weekend stay. Minimal communication needed.

str_reviews.review_text: Our second stay at the Sunset Beach Bungalow and it was even better than the first! The pool was sparkling, the kitchen had everything we needed for a seafood boil, and the walk to the beach is so short. Our favorite part is the covered patio — we spent every morning there with coffee watching the sunrise. Already planning our September return trip!
str_reviews.host_response: Emily, we absolutely love having you and your crew back! So glad you enjoyed the patio mornings — that's our favorite spot too. The seafood boil sounds amazing. Your September dates are already blocked off for you. See you then!

str_reviews.review_text: Great location for a Nashville weekend. The loft is beautifully designed and very clean. Walked to the Ryman and Broadway easily. Only reason for 4 stars instead of 5 is the street noise on Friday night — bring earplugs if you're a light sleeper. The EV charger was a huge bonus. Would definitely stay again.
str_reviews.host_response: Thanks James! Glad you enjoyed the location and the EV charger. Great tip about the earplugs on Friday nights — we've actually just ordered blackout curtains with extra sound dampening that should help. Hope to host you again next time you're in Nashville!

str_reviews.review_text: Spent Valentine's weekend at Misty Ridge and it was absolutely magical. Woke up to snow on the mountains, spent the day hiking, then came back to the hot tub with mountain views. The fireplace is real wood-burning and made the whole cabin smell incredible. Kitchen was fully stocked — we cooked a fancy dinner in. The game room was a fun bonus. Already booked the beach house from the same host for spring!
str_reviews.host_response: Sarah, what a perfect Valentine's getaway! Snow on the mountains is always a treat. So happy you enjoyed the fireplace and the hot tub views — that combo is hard to beat. We're thrilled you loved it enough to book the beach house too. You're officially part of the family!

str_reviews.review_text: Absolutely perfect solo travel stay. The loft is gorgeous — the exposed brick and big windows make it feel so open. Bed was super comfortable. Loved being able to walk everywhere downtown. The gym in the building was a nice touch. Host communication was quick and helpful. Will be my go-to whenever I visit Nashville.
str_reviews.host_response: So glad you had a wonderful solo trip, Anna! Nashville is such a great city to explore on foot from the loft. We love hearing that the gym came in handy. You're welcome back anytime!

str_reviews.review_text: The Sunset Beach Bungalow exceeded all expectations. Spotless, well-appointed, and the location is unbeatable. The pool was perfect after a day at the beach. Host left a welcome basket with local snacks and a handwritten note — such a nice personal touch. My two dogs loved the fenced yard. This is now our annual beach trip destination.
str_reviews.host_response: Thank you so much Sarah! Your pups were the best-behaved guests we've ever had. So glad the welcome basket was a hit — we partner with local shops to put those together. Can't wait to have you back!

str_reviews.review_text: The cabin itself is beautiful and the views are stunning. However, the hot tub was not working when we arrived and it took the host a full day to get it fixed. Also, the driveway is very steep and difficult to navigate — would have been helpful to know that upfront, especially in winter. Once the hot tub was fixed, we enjoyed the rest of the stay.
str_reviews.host_response: We sincerely apologize about the hot tub — the heating element failed unexpectedly and our technician came as quickly as possible. We've since installed a backup heater to prevent this from happening again. You make an excellent point about the driveway — we've added detailed driving instructions and a steep driveway warning to our listing. Thank you for the constructive feedback.

str_turnovers.special_instructions: Guest had dogs — vacuum all furniture and mop floors. Check yard for pet waste.
str_turnovers.inspection_notes: Property in excellent condition. No damage. Restocked linens and towels. Replaced welcome basket. Pool skimmed and chemical levels checked.

str_turnovers.special_instructions: Standard turnover. Check EV charger cable is properly stored.
str_turnovers.inspection_notes: All good. One wine glass chipped — replaced from backup set. EV charger cable neatly stored.

str_turnovers.special_instructions: Deep clean hot tub after Valentine's weekend. Restock firewood on porch.
str_turnovers.inspection_notes: Noticed small crack in master bathroom shower tile grout. Not urgent but should be repaired before it worsens. Firewood restocked. Hot tub drained, cleaned, and refilled.
str_turnovers.issue_description: Small grout crack found in master bathroom shower — approximately 8 inches along the tile seam. Functional but cosmetic issue. Recommend regrouting within 30 days to prevent water infiltration.

str_messages.message_text: Hi! We're so excited for our week at the bungalow. Quick question — is the grill propane or charcoal? We're planning a seafood cookout one night. Also, are there any good fish markets nearby where we can get fresh catch?

Hi Sarah! So great to have you back! The grill is propane and fully stocked — you're all set for the seafood cookout. For fresh catch, head to Billy's Seafood on the main road (about 1 mile north) — they bring in fresh Gulf shrimp and grouper daily. Get there before 2pm for the best selection. Enjoy and let us know if you need anything!

Hey, we just checked in and everything looks great. One thing — the TV remote seems to be out of batteries. Is there a spare set somewhere? Also, any chance we can get a late checkout on Sunday? Our flight isn't until 6pm.

Hi James! Welcome to the loft! There are spare batteries in the top drawer of the TV console — should be a pack of AAs right there. As for late checkout, absolutely — you're welcome to stay until 1pm on Sunday since our next guest isn't arriving until the following day. Enjoy the Ryman tonight!

Hi Wei! Thank you for booking Misty Ridge for your family's spring break trip. We're so excited to host your crew! A few things to help you prepare: (1) The driveway is steep — 4WD or AWD recommended, (2) We'll have the pack-n-play set up in the master bedroom, (3) The hot tub will be freshly cleaned and heated to 102F for your arrival. Check-in instructions with the door code will be sent 3 days before arrival. Can't wait to welcome the Chen family!
